race.comment: BOSS BOY (2) missed the placings two runs back then improved last start but found a couple better over 1600m at Echuca, beaten 1.5 lengths after racing up on speed. Should be ready to peak now from a nice gate and will take beating. RAINY NIGHT (8) got back then picked up fairly well in the straight and finished 4.5 lengths away in sixth last time out over 1400m at Pakenham Synthetic. Up in trip should suit better now and he can do much better. KING TAGALOA (5) resumes having shown some ability last time in, this trip suits fresh if he's ready to go. A LONG STORY SHORT (1) is a two-start maiden who was unplaced on debut then improved somewhat to finish third last time over 1628m at Moe, beaten 7 lengths. He can figure again with natural upside. LONG SHOT (8) has shown hints in four runs to date and is in the mix.
